global.title: SEIA: AI is fueling a massive US energy storage boom

global.title: SpaceX S-1 reveals Tesla’s Terafab deal is far from done
global.summary: SpaceX filed its S-1 with the SEC today ahead of its blockbuster IPO, and buried in the 308-page document is a sobering reality check on the Tesla (TSLA) collaborations that Elon Musk has been hyping for months. global.title: Yes, an EV really CAN power your home – if it’s one of these [update]
global.summary: Can an EV really help power your home when the power goes out? It’s one of the biggest FAQs people have about electric cars — but the answer can be a bit confusing. global.title: Electrifying your fleet isn’t just about going green – it’s about staying in business
global.summary: In the world of business, there are two kinds of sustainability – sustainability in the sense that we need a planet to live and breathe on, and sustainability in the sense that the business needs to stay in business. global.title: In a first, wind and solar generated more power than gas globally in April 2026
global.summary: Wind and solar just hit a major global milestone: For the first time ever, they generated more electricity than gas for the full month of April. more…

global.title: The Chevy Equinox EV gains a few extras for 2027, including one that drivers will appreciate
global.summary: Although the new Bolt is now on sale, GM is still calling the electric Chevy Equinox “America’s most affordable 315+ mile range EV.” For the 2027 model year, GM is addressing at least one of the biggest complaints with the current model. more…

global.title: Now Bojangles wants EV drivers to fast charge while they eat
global.summary: Southern fast-food chain Bojangles is getting into EV charging, debuting its first DC fast-charging station in Savannah, Georgia. more…

global.title: BYD is struggling to meet demand for new fast-charging EVs as orders reach 100K, 60K
global.summary: BYD’s new flagship electric SUV, equipped with its new Blade Battery 2.0 and Flash Charging tech, has received over 100,000 orders. The new Song Ultra EV secured over 61,000. BYD said it can’t keep up with demand. more…
